name: Apostle Cauterine — The Inverted Sun
description:
Arcana XIX, Reversed

“La misericordia arde... the mercy burns...”

There was a time when she was known simply as Maiden Cauterine of the Fiery Sun, the first and brightest among the Solar Vestals.
Her radiance was said to bring:

  • warmth to the barren,

  • healing to the broken,

  • purity to the blighted.

She embodied the true Sun upright—joy, clarity, and life.

But the world twisted her before she could fulfill the destiny she was born for.

The King’s Abduction

She was the first maiden taken by The Patriarch, a sovereign whose hunger for divine power had already eclipsed sanity.

Dragged from her order, she was taken beneath the earth—
not to a temple,
not to a prison,
but to something far worse:

an underground megastructure carved beneath the Whispering Grotto,
a cathedral so vast it could cradle a mountain within its nave.

Inside this secret abyss, the King sought to harvest her solar divinity.

She endured:
humiliations, violations of sanctity, cruelties that were meant to shatter her faith and ignite her power.
They did shatter something—
but not in the way he expected.

What dimmed was not her light.
It was her belief in the world.

The Unbinding of the Blindfold

The Vestals of the Fiery Sun wore blessed ironclad blindfolds, forged to contain their celestial gaze.
Removing it was forbidden.
creator: redstag333
